name: acti-motus
summary: Python-powered human activity recognition algorithm that build upon Acti4, processing data from multiple accelerometers with a required thigh sensor.
author_email: Josef Heidler <heidlerjosef@gmail.com>, Jon Roslyng Larsen <xjla@nfa.dk>, Sebastian Asmussen Sode Hørlück <ssh@nfa.dk>
